name: SAS Customer Intelligence 360
description: Unified customer data platform with journey orchestration, real-time personalization, and marketing optimization — enabling brands to deliver the right message to the right customer at the right moment across every channel.
elevatorPitch: Unified customer journey analytics with real-time personalization, next-best-action, and marketing optimization.
capabilities: Journey orchestration across web, mobile, email, and in-store
Identity resolution and unified customer profiles
Campaign optimization with automated A/B testing
Multi-touch attribution and marketing mix modeling
targetBuyer: CMO, VP of Marketing, Head of CX, Head of Digital, Business Unit Leader
